overview.description: The Procter & Gamble Company provides branded consumer packaged goods worldwide. It operates through Beauty; Grooming; Health Care; Fabric & Home Care; and Baby, Feminine & Family Care segments. The company offers conditioners, shampoos, styling aids, and treatments under the Head & Shoulders, Herbal Essences, Pantene, and Rejoice brands; antiperspirants, deodorants, and personal cleansing products under the Native, Old Spice, Safeguard, and Secret brands; and facial moisturizers, cleaners, and treatments under the Olay and SK-II brands. It als...
overview.financialIntro: In fiscal year 2025, Procter & Gamble's revenue was $84.28 billion, an increase of 0.29% compared to the previous year's $84.04 billion. Earnings were $15.68 billion, an increase of 7.45%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 25 analysts, the average rating for PG stock is "Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $163.3, which is an increase of 10.06% from the latest price.
